SEARCH
Package com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.protocol.api

Class ProtocolController

java.lang.Object
com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.protocol.api.ProtocolController
@RestController @RequestMapping("/api/2pc") public class ProtocolController extends Object
REST controllers that receive 2PC protocol messages from the coordinator.

All endpoints are on the path /api/2pc/ and are reachable only by the coordinator or other participants (during election). The crash fault interceptor blocks these endpoints when CRASH fault is active.

    Method

    org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Void>
    abort(AbortMessage message)
    Phase 2 ABORT: applies the abort decision to the local log.
    org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Void>
    commit(CommitMessage message)
    Phase 2 COMMIT: applies the commit decision to the local log.
    org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<VoteMessage>
    prepare(PrepareMessage message)
    Phase 1: receives a PREPARE and returns this participant's vote.

  • Method Details

    • prepare

      @PostMapping("/prepare") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<VoteMessage> prepare(@RequestBody PrepareMessage message)
      Phase 1: receives a PREPARE and returns this participant's vote.
      Parameters:
      message - the coordinator's prepare request.
      Returns:
      the vote response.

    • commit

      @PostMapping("/commit") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Void> commit(@RequestBody CommitMessage message)
      Phase 2 COMMIT: applies the commit decision to the local log.
      Parameters:
      message - the coordinator's commit instruction.
      Returns:
      204 No Content on success.

    • abort

      @PostMapping("/abort") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Void> abort(@RequestBody AbortMessage message)
      Phase 2 ABORT: applies the abort decision to the local log.
      Parameters:
      message - the coordinator's abort instruction.
      Returns:
      204 No Content on success.
